scope: Full design system (35 z-signal docs + Bauhaus engine + Quant Master Theme)
open_findings: RED: Generative Engine is 2200 lines of rules, zero executable code
RED: Gold #D4A84B fails WCAG AA (2.2:1) used as semantic color in tokens
RED: Component library is ASCII art — no usable JSX/HTML components
RED: Motion system missing scroll-driven, page transitions, stagger, particle systems
RED: Shadow token contradicts itself in 3 docs (4px vs 6px vs 8px in production)
RED: Terminal aesthetic aging risk — no escape hatch documented
YELLOW: Dark mode fully specified (Doc 17) but not implemented in CSS/tokens
YELLOW: 7 project types have zero spec (email, CLI, print, Remotion, pitch deck, infographic, p5.js)
YELLOW: Typography lacks modular scale and fluid type
YELLOW: Token export missing (no JSON/YAML/TS — blocks Figma, iOS, Android)
YELLOW: No breakpoint definitions in mobile patterns
YELLOW: 6-color palette insufficient for 8+ series data visualization
YELLOW: No-bounce constraint too broad — kills expressiveness in art contexts
systemic_patterns: Gold #D4A84B WCAG failure appears in BOTH zignal-gold-v2 (application) and design system spec — confirmed systemic across 2 audits
Theory-implementation gap: all design systems audited have excellent docs but insufficient working code
